# To re-render manually (from cyrillic-reference/):
#   glyphplotter --input glyphplotter/Sans/variants/F50D.cv.txt \
#                --output svg/Sans/variants/F50D.cv.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-sans-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: ҫ
comment "Cyrillic Small Letter Es With Descender uni04AB"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 474 0 /uni04AB
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04AB"
move 1400

# ------- Arrow sign
strokeDash 0 0
strokeWidth 80 # for plus and arrow signs
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawArrow pen 350 250 1000 250 closed60
move 1200

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: ҫ (variant uni04AB.CHU)
comment "Cyrillic Small Letter Es With Descender uni04AB variant uni04AB.CHU"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 474 0 /uni04AB.CHU
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04AB"
move 1400
